subcodes.first_line: O my cherished sister! Thou art never absent from my thoughts. I speak of thee and call thee to mind at all times.
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شقیقتی العزیزه آنی شما را فراموش ننمایم همواره در فکر و ذکر تو هستم از
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @moderation; frugality; simplicity
